preview.summary: A Group L heavyweight clash and a rematch of the 2018 World Cup semi-final. Thomas Tuchel's high-pressing England face a vastly experienced Croatia side marshalled by Luka Modric. Tournament pedigree on both sides makes this the pick of the group's openers.
preview.homeForm: Ranked 4th, England qualified first of any European side, winning every game without conceding.
preview.awayForm: Top 15 and unbeaten in qualifying, Croatia won seven of eight in their best-ever campaign.
preview.homeKey: Harry Kane, captain and England's most decisive attacking presence.
preview.awayKey: Luka Modric, 40, conducting midfield at a record sixth World Cup.
storylines: Rematch of Croatia's 2018 semi-final win over England
Tuchel's reshaped England in their tournament debut
Modric joins Messi and Ronaldo with six World Cups
preview.h2h: England lead recent meetings but Croatia won the most famous one, 2-1 after extra time in the 2018 semi-final.
